summary: Travel app (Travelogue feature) with a 2D map showing journey schedule item markers. Currently on version 1144. Active fixes: (1) 2D map not rendering on first button click without hard refresh, (2) multiple journeys sharing the same city only show markers from the first journey.
architectural_notes: 2D map is under the Travelogue section and displays journey schedule item markers
Map fix must be scoped strictly to map rendering/initialization logic — no UI layout or JSX restructuring
known_issues: 2D map requires hard refresh + button click to render on first load (timing/initialization issue)
When multiple journeys share the same city, only the first journey's markers appear on the 2D map

existing_features.title: Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so it renders correctly on the first button click without requiring a hard refresh. The map component likely mounts before its container dimensions or data are ready — ensure the Leaflet map is initialized only after its container is fully mounted and visible, and that it invalidates its size after becoming visible (e.g., via a resize/invalidateSize call triggered on mount or visibility change).

Fix the 2D map in the Travelogue panel so that when multiple journeys share the same city, markers from all those journeys are shown on the map — not just the markers from the first journey added for that city. The current deduplication or keying logic is discarding markers from subsequent journeys with the same city. Each journey's schedule items must produce their own distinct markers regardless of shared city names.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix 2D map not rendering on first load without hard refresh in Travelogue
Fix 2D map showing only first journey's markers when multiple journeys share the same city
